dreams.title: I want to catch 100+ points in #BankNifty Trade

I trust univese that you will give me that best setup which is easy for me to handle to grab this 100+ trade

Thank you for keeping me active in trading for all these days. I am really happy for gaining direct skills from you.. even I wonder sometime. How you are giving me this clue.. else its really a difficult topic. thank you for making our present interesting and future wealthy
I am ready for catching next 100 points
I have trust that universe will guild me for the right time or it will make the time right
Thank you universe always for positive surprise

dreams.title: I have earned 4500+ points in  all my  trades before Jun 2026 Expiry

logs.text: I am sipping down water and feeling how 2,70,000 Looks into acount
I do trust You Univese for having abandance with you. for you this is very small things and you can surely help me

Thank You Univese for helping me out in identifying this right opportunity on right time and althought if there are few people who may not support this view. let the view evolve and help them to understand this for there betterment. and Thank you for giving me such a clarity
I know the next -4000 point fall in happening in my direction. and I will nothing but watch the move happening.

All those who have copied my trade will thank me because they have caught now more than 2000 points in one single trade which is like dream for them. but they trust me and I have full trust on universe. this dream is so small against the capacity of universe
Thank You Universe for giving me courage to hold this dream

dreams.title: Sanjay Kadam - became Manager for Technical Solution MDM India Team

I do trust you have everything in abandance and I am waiting for the delivery.
I would like to thank you for all good health, money, and life, family, friend and everything you have given me today.

I felt like I am manager since next week
I believe this order will be delivered
Thank You Universe for helping me in styaing and growing in Lanxess
